name: Finary - Single Email Demo + KB + GPT + Merge + Full Email Content v7

parameters.content:
## Setup
1. In `Draft Reply with GPT`, select your OpenAI credential.
2. In the 3 email nodes, select your SMTP/Gmail/Outlook credential.
3. This demo processes only one email row.
4. Emails are prefilled to:
- From: yann@nomiks.io
- To: yann.mastin@gmail.com
5. The validator receives the exact client draft first. After approval, the same draft is sent to the client mock email.

## Credentials
- In `Draft Reply with GPT`, choose your OpenAI credential.
- In all 3 email nodes, choose your email credential.
- Emails are already prefilled with From/To and full draft content.
